rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees referring to ports, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Insert AGREE annex blocks in valid AADL component type or implementation scopes only.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules when inserting AGREE annexes.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use valid AADL component and port names in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place AGREE assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes unless they refer to implementation-level bindings.
Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints not directly tied to component ports
Boolean data range comparisons with opaque or enumeration-like types
Type mismatch diagnostics between assumed and actual types in AGREE
